item.title: New and Improved “CVE Program Web Forms” Now Available
item.description: New and Improved “CVE Program Web Forms” Now AvailablenewsMay 19, 2026The CVE Program is pleased to announce that new and improved versions of the “CVE Program Web Forms” are now available for use by the community. The forms include General Support (formerly “Other”), CVE ID Requests (from MITRE CNA-LR only), Report a Reserved by Public CVE ID, Join a Working Group, Register to Become a CNA, and more.

item.title: Airlock Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Airlock Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMay 27, 2026Airlock by Ergonis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Airlock issues only: Airlock SaaS, Airlock Identity and Access Management (IAM), Airlock Gateway, and Airlock Microgateway.

item.title: Thinkst Applied Research Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Thinkst Applied Research Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsMay 27, 2026Thinkst Applied Researchis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for Thinkst Applied Research’s products only.

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on April 29 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on April 29 Now AvailablenewsJune 2, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on April 29, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Videos fromCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026Now Available
item.description: Videos fromCVE/FIRST VulnCon 2026Now AvailableblogBy CVE Program|June 2, 2026

item.title: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 259 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for June 1, 2026
item.description: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 259 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for June 1, 2026blogBy CVE Program|June 2, 2026

item.title: Cynet Security Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Cynet Security Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 2, 2026Cynet Security Inc.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in Cynet Security products and services, including the Cynet Platform (formerly marketed as Cynet360 and All in One), endpoint agents (Windows, macOS, Linux), Cynet-managed APIs, web applications, and internet-facing infrastructure operated by Cynet Security.

item.title: linqi Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: linqi Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 2, 2026linqi GmbHis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in linqi products only.

item.title: OMICRON electronics Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: OMICRON electronics Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 2, 2026OMICRON electronicsis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for OMICRON electronics issues only.

item.title: IQSIGHT Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: IQSIGHT Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 2, 2026IQSIGHT B.V.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all IQSIGHT (formerly Bosch Building Technology - Video Systems) products including end-of-life products.
